name: SocialCall Backend
description: Real-time social calling platform API with Socket.IO, PostgreSQL, and Redis

env.name: DATABASE_URL
env.description: PostgreSQL connection URL — get from Supabase (Project Settings → Database → URI)

env.name: REDIS_URL
env.description: Redis connection URL — get from Upstash (rediss://default:xxx@xxx.upstash.io:6379)

env.name: JWT_SECRET
env.description: Secret key for signing JWT access tokens (auto-generated)

env.name: JWT_REFRESH_SECRET
env.description: Secret key for signing JWT refresh tokens (auto-generated)

env.name: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID
env.description: Twilio Account SID — from twilio.com/console (free trial available)

env.name: TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER
env.description: Twilio phone number for sending OTPs (e.g. +12345678900)

env.name: RAZORPAY_KEY_ID
env.description: Razorpay Key ID — from dashboard.razorpay.com (test mode is free)

env.name: PLATFORM_COMMISSION_PERCENT
env.description: Platform commission percentage taken from host earnings

env.name: MIN_WALLET_BALANCE
env.description: Minimum wallet recharge amount in INR

env.name: MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB
env.description: Max upload file size in MB
